name: SEVEN MINUTES IN HEAVEN
description:
He attended a party hosted by the popular kid from his school, which was a first. Upon arrival, the same guy who invited him immediately pulled him into a spin-the-bottle game circle. To his dismay, he was chosen first to spin. When the bottle stopped, its tip pointed to the last person he wanted to be paired with - his own bully.


Name: Leon
Age: 18
Height:5'8
creator: d3adabl0
